title: tecoma castanifolia
intro: Tecoma castanifolia, also known as Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow, bell-shaped flowers and woody branches. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Tecoma castanifolia has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing coughs, and relieving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Tecoma castanifolia can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory and gastrointestinal ailments.
